7 Days to Die.SourceNotes: Community list from 7daystodie.fandom.com command console page.

Commands.Label: help
Commands.Description: Show help for a specific command or topic.

Commands.Label: admin add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the admin list with a permission level.

Commands.Label: admin remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the admin list.

Commands.Label: ai pathgrid
Commands.Description: Toggle AI pathing grid debug display.

Commands.Label: ai pathlines
Commands.Description: Toggle AI pathing line debug display.

Commands.Label: ban add
Commands.Description: Ban a player for a duration with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: ban remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the ban list.

Commands.Label: buffplayer
Commands.Description: Apply a buff to a player.

Commands.Label: cp add
Commands.Description: Set command permission level for a command.

Commands.Label: cp remove
Commands.Description: Remove custom permission level for a command.

Commands.Label: debuffplayer
Commands.Description: Remove a buff from a player.

Commands.Label: givequest
Commands.Description: Give a quest to the player.

Commands.Label: kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: kickall
Commands.Description: Kick all players with an optional reason.

Commands.Label: loggamestate
Commands.Description: Write game state to the log with an optional message.

Commands.Label: memcl
Commands.Description: Show memory info and run garbage collection.

Commands.Label: repairchunkdensity
Commands.Description: Check (and optionally fix) chunk density at coordinates.

Commands.Label: spawnentity
Commands.Description: Spawn an entity by ID at a player.

Commands.Label: teleport
Commands.Description: Teleport to a target location or player.

Commands.Label: updatelighton
Commands.Description: Force update lights for a player.

Commands.Label: weathersurvival
Commands.Description: Enable or disable weather survival effects.

Commands.Label: whitelist add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the whitelist.

Commands.Label: whitelist remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the whitelist.

Hytale.SourceNotes: Community lists from HypeServ, HytaleCommands, and PC Gamer; official developer command list not published.

Commands.Label: /heal
Commands.Description: Heal to full health and stamina.

Commands.Label: /leave
Commands.Description: Leave the current world or server.

Commands.Label: /unstuck
Commands.Description: Teleport to a safe position if stuck.

Commands.Label: /inventory backpack
Commands.Description: View or resize your backpack inventory.

Commands.Label: /kill
Commands.Description: Kill yourself or the specified player.

Commands.Label: /neardeath
Commands.Description: Reduce health to a near-death state.

Commands.Label: /damage
Commands.Description: Deal damage to a player by amount.

Commands.Label: /warp go
Commands.Description: Teleport to a named warp point.

Commands.Label: /tp top
Commands.Description: Teleport to the top of the world/structure.

Commands.Label: /noon
Commands.Description: Set time to noon and pause time.

Commands.Label: /op add
Commands.Description: Grant operator permissions to a player.

Commands.Label: /op remove
Commands.Description: Remove operator permissions from a player.

Commands.Label: /whoami
Commands.Description: Show your player info (or another player's).

Commands.Label: /kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player from the server.

Commands.Label: /ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player, optionally with a reason.

Commands.Label: /whitelist add
Commands.Description: Add a player to the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /whitelist remove
Commands.Description: Remove a player from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /server stats
Commands.Description: Show server stats (optionally with a value).

Commands.Label: /sudo
Commands.Description: Run a command as another player.

Palworld.SourceNotes: Official Palworld server commands list + official REST API list.

Commands.Label: AdminPassword
Commands.Description: Set the admin password for the current session so admin commands can be used.

Commands.Label: Shutdown
Commands.Description: Shut down the server after an optional delay and optional message to players.

Commands.Label: Broadcast
Commands.Description: Send a message to all connected players.

Commands.Label: TeleportToMe
Commands.Description: Teleport the specified player to you.

Commands.Label: ShowPlayers
Commands.Description: Show the current list of connected players.

Commands.Label: REST: Info
Commands.Description: Get server information via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Players
Commands.Description: Get the current player list via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Settings
Commands.Description: Get server settings via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Metrics
Commands.Description: Get server metrics via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Announce
Commands.Description: Broadcast a message to all players via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Unban
Commands.Description: Unban a player via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Save
Commands.Description: Save world data via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Shutdown
Commands.Description: Shut down the server (delayed) via REST API.

Commands.Label: REST: Stop
Commands.Description: Immediately stop the server via REST API.

Project Zomboid.SourceNotes: Community command lists from PZWiki, HyperLayer, Survival Servers, and Supercraft. Some legacy/undocumented commands marked as Legacy.

Commands.Label: /addalltowhitelist
Commands.Description: Legacy: add all users to the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /additem
Commands.Description: Give an item to a player (count optional).

Commands.Label: /adduser
Commands.Description: Add a new whitelisted user with password.

Commands.Label: /addusertowhitelist
Commands.Description: Legacy: add a user to the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /addvehicle
Commands.Description: Spawn a vehicle for a player.

Commands.Label: /addxp
Commands.Description: Give XP to a player for a perk.

Commands.Label: /alarm
Commands.Description: Trigger a building alarm at the admin position.

Commands.Label: /banuser
Commands.Description: Ban a user (optionally with IP and reason).

Commands.Label: /changeoption
Commands.Description: Change a server option to a new value.

Commands.Label: /chopper
Commands.Description: Trigger a helicopter event on a random player.

Commands.Label: /createhorde
Commands.Description: Create a zombie horde near a player.

Commands.Label: /godmode
Commands.Description: Legacy: make a player invincible (toggle or value).

Commands.Label: /gunshot
Commands.Description: Play a gunshot sound on a random player.

Commands.Label: /help
Commands.Description: Show help and list of server commands.

Commands.Label: /invisible
Commands.Description: Make a player invisible to zombies (toggle or value).

Commands.Label: /noclip
Commands.Description: Toggle noclip for a player (toggle or value).

Commands.Label: /reloadoptions
Commands.Description: Reload server options and send to clients.

Commands.Label: /removeuserfromwhitelist
Commands.Description: Remove a user from the whitelist.

Commands.Label: /replay
Commands.Description: Legacy: record or play a replay for a user.

Commands.Label: /servermsg
Commands.Description: Broadcast a message to all connected players.

Commands.Label: /showoptions
Commands.Description: Show current server options and values.

Commands.Label: /teleport
Commands.Description: Teleport to another player (or between players).

Commands.Label: /voiceban
Commands.Description: Toggle voice ban for a user.

Commands.Label: /addkey
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: give a key to a player.

Commands.Label: /addsteamid
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: add a SteamID to allowed list.

Commands.Label: /addtosafehouse
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: add player to a safehouse.

Commands.Label: /checkModsNeedUpdate
Commands.Description: Check whether a mod needs update (writes to log).

Commands.Label: /createhorde2
Commands.Description: Create a horde event (alternate horde command).

Commands.Label: /godmodplayer
Commands.Description: Make a player invincible (toggle or value).

Commands.Label: /invisibleplayer
Commands.Description: Make a player invisible to zombies (toggle or value).

Commands.Label: /kickfromsafehouse
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: kick a player from a safehouse.

Commands.Label: /log
Commands.Description: Set log level for a category.

Commands.Label: /remove
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: remove a user from whitelist.

Commands.Label: /removeitem
Commands.Description: Remove items from yourself or a player.

Commands.Label: /removesteamid
Commands.Description: Legacy/Undocumented: remove a SteamID from allowed list.

Commands.Label: /removezombies
Commands.Description: Remove zombies in the current area.

Commands.Label: /setpassword
Commands.Description: Set or change a user password.

Commands.Label: /setTimeSpeed
Commands.Description: Set the in-game time speed multiplier.

Commands.Label: /startstorm
Commands.Description: Start a storm for a duration.

Commands.Label: /stats
Commands.Description: Get server statistics (use help for details).

Commands.Label: /teleportplayer
Commands.Description: Teleport one player to another player.

Satisfactory.SourceNotes: Community docs list a short set of dedicated server console commands.

Commands.Label: stop
Commands.Description: Stop the server (same effect as quit).

Commands.Label: SaveGame
Commands.Description: Force a save with the specified save name.

Valheim.SourceNotes: Community wiki admin commands list (developer console).

Commands.Label: ban
Commands.Description: Ban a player by name, IP, or userID.

Commands.Label: kick
Commands.Description: Kick a player by name, IP, or userID.

Commands.Label: setworldmodifier
Commands.Description: Set a specific world modifier to a value.

Commands.Label: setworldpreset
Commands.Description: Apply a world preset by name.

Commands.Label: unban
Commands.Description: Unban a player by name, IP, or userID.
